items.title: Supreme Court to use software to identify justices’ conflict of interests
items.description: The Supreme Court will begin using software to scan litigants’ filings to identify justices’ potential conflicts of interest.

items.title: Trump picks his White House assistant for panel reviewing ballroom
items.description: Chamberlain Harris, a 26-year-old White House aide and the president’s longtime executive assistant, is set to be sworn in Thursday.

items.title: Hegseth forces ouster of senior Army spokesman in latest internal clash
items.description: Col. David Butler, who had been selected by senior Army leaders for promotion to brigadier general, will instead retire, officials said.

items.title: Jesse Jackson, a leading voice for civil rights, dies at 84

items.title: I covered Jesse Jackson’s 1988 campaign. The racism he faced was undisguised.
